notes:
Metal working-set guard raised to 98% — large bundles (Hy3-preview-JANGTQ2 79GB, future JANGTQ_K) now load freely on M5 Max 128GB without false-positive rejection.

Production-eligible (live-proven):
- ZAYA1-8B + ZAYA1-VL-8B all profiles (MXFP4, JANGTQ4, JANGTQ_K) — multi-turn cache reuse via paged+zaya_cca verified
- Qwen3.6-35B MoE: text + image + video (MXFP4 + MXTQ/JANGTQ); affine-JANG correctly routed text-only
- Ling JANGTQ: hybrid SSM, /v1/responses multi-turn cache reuse
- Hy3 JANGTQ2: 80 TurboQuantKVCache layers, Low/High effort, full 79GB bundle loads at 97% RAM saturation with 98% threshold
- MiniMax JANGTQ: 43+ visible tok/s with SIMD-shuffle Hadamard kernel

Metal working-set guard (vmlx 8d3deb99):
- Default reject threshold raised from 85% to 98% across all 6 callers (server request guard, text scheduler admission, MLLM scheduler admission, VLM image-prefill, JANG loader wired-limit, memory_limits helper)
- 2% headroom still catches genuine Metal command-buffer OOM signature before engine-process crash
- Override via VMLX_METAL_WS_REJECT_PCT, VMLX_METAL_WS_MAX_BYTES, VMLX_METAL_WS_MAX_GB, VMLX_METAL_WS_GUARD=0
- Live-validated: Hy3-preview-JANGTQ2 (79 GB) loaded in 25s on M5 Max 128 GB, 3-turn multi-turn coherent

Cache namespace hardening (vmlx 7404e072, 6ad9d379):
- Disk cache records scoped by runtime fingerprint — stale records from prior process lifecycle no longer silently restored on wake / auto-update
- Memory + working-set logic unified in vmlx_engine/utils/memory_limits.py

Image API release surface (vmlx 7770d00f):
- API quick-start panel shows real curl/Python/JS examples for /v1/images/generations and /v1/images/edits
- Mask data URL prefix stripped before POST
- Mask optional except for Fill/inpaint

Qwen routing correctness (vmlx 80a62555):
- Affine-JANG Qwen3.5/3.6 hybrid VLM bundles route text-only (mlx_vlm MRoPE bug bypass)
- Preempted for qwen3_vl + qwen3_vl_moe families

Carry-over (not regressions):
- DSV4 long-context coherence still not public-upload-clean — needs re-quantization with 4-bit routed
- i18n key restoration in progress (zh/ko/ja/es partial; English fallback covers all surfaces)
